framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Master Scorecard
framework_documents.description: Single source of truth for PulseOne's current performance metrics mapped against Service Leadership BiC benchmarks. v2.0 integrates Technician Efficiency Audit, Software Resale Addendum (resolving -9.4% margin mystery), COGS/SGA reclassification, and client concentration analysis.
key_changes_v2: Software resale GM reclassified from CRITICAL FAILURE to REVENUE MAPPING ISSUE (true GM 68.1%)
Added corrected GM (33.6%) and corrected SGA (29.4%) after $194K reclassification
Added client concentration metrics: Top 1 = 23.9%, Top 2 = 41.8%
Added Bunzl ticket anomaly: 46.9% tickets / 17.9% revenue
Populated service utilization section with Technician Efficiency findings
Identified Microsoft M365 (16.4% GM) and Adobe (4.3% GM) as structural issues

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Action Register
framework_documents.description: Centralized, prioritized register of actionable recommendations. v2.0 reframes software actions around revenue mapping (not pricing failure), adds client concentration and Bunzl anomaly actions, integrates Technician Efficiency findings, and updates ConnectWise data requests.

framework_documents.title: PulseOne BiC Standardized Documentation Plan
framework_documents.description: Master plan defining the 4-part standardized documentation architecture: Scorecard, Financial Model, Operational Audits, and Action Register.

financial_model.title: PulseOne Definitive P&L Analysis
financial_model.description: Definitive corrected P&L using confirmed CY 2025 Upwork data. All 12 freelancers classified. Reconciled to $0.30. This is the authoritative P&L version.

financial_model.title: PulseOne COGS Classification Analysis — Person by Person
financial_model.description: Complete person-by-person COGS vs. SG&A classification for all 38 PulseOne personnel. Confirmed by Paul Freeman April 17, 2026.

operational_audits.title: Software Resale & SaaS Rationalization
operational_audits.description: Consolidated software resale and SaaS rationalization audit. Addendum resolves the -9.4% margin as a revenue mapping issue (true CW margin 68.1%). Identifies structural issues with Microsoft M365 (16.4% GM) and Adobe (4.3% GM). Covers $194,092 COGS/SGA misallocation, Barracuda cost escalation, and TD Synnex billing transparency.

operational_audits.title: Technician Utilization, Cost Efficiency & Client Profitability
operational_audits.description: Strategic audit of technician utilization, service delivery workload distribution, labor cost efficiency, and client-level profitability. Confirms Help Desk operating at 5.41x Service Multiple of Labor (BiC target 2.80x). Identifies severe client concentration risk (Arc 23.9%, Bunzl 17.9%, combined 41.8%) and Bunzl ticket anomaly (46.9% of tickets, 17.9% of revenue).

key_findings.key_person_risk: S. Calkins handles 24% of all tickets

operational_audits.title: Utilization & Billing Efficiency
operational_audits.description: Three overlapping documents covering technician utilization and billing leakage. Partially superseded by the Technician Efficiency Audit. Should be consolidated into a single Audit_Utilization_and_Billing.md using the 9-section format.

operational_audits.title: Profit Leakage & SG&A Analysis
operational_audits.description: Four overlapping documents covering profit leakage decomposition, departmental SG&A, and labor model reconciliation. Should be consolidated into a single Audit_Profitability_and_SGA.md using the 9-section format.

operational_audits.title: Client Profitability & Revenue Quality
operational_audits.description: Client concentration analysis, revenue quality assessment, and product sales breakdown. Confirms 73.8% recurring revenue. Blocked on ConnectWise hours-by-client data for full completion.

operational_audits.title: Revised Comprehensive BiC Audit Report
operational_audits.description: Comprehensive BiC audit incorporating expense tracking and partner compensation allocation. Supersedes the original BIC Audit Report (now archived).

operational_audits.title: Project Costing & Margin (Incoming)
operational_audits.description: Template for the incoming project margin and costing analysis. Will be populated when the updated project report is provided.
